name: ExtensionImmunization_SupportingInformation
title: R5: Additional information in support of the immunization (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Immunization.supportingInformation` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Immunization.supportingInformation` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Immunization.supportingInformation` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Immunization.supportingInformation` has a context of Immunization based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Immunization`.
Element `Immunization.supportingInformation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Additional information in support of the immunization (new)
element.comment:
Element `Immunization.supportingInformation` has a context of Immunization based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Immunization`.
Element `Immunization.supportingInformation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Additional information in support of the immunization
element.definition: Additional information that is relevant to the immunization (e.g. for a vaccine recipient who is pregnant, the gestational age of the fetus). The reason why a vaccine was given (e.g. occupation, underlying medical condition) should be conveyed in Immunization.reason, not as supporting information. The reason why a vaccine was not given (e.g. contraindication) should be conveyed in Immunization.statusReason, not as supporting information.
